entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The primary staple crop targeted for productivity increase in Nigeria.

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: The country where the agricultural transformation programs were implemented.

entities.name: BIDA-BADEGGI
entities.description: A staple crop processing zone where improved varieties and seed dressing increased sorghum yields.

entities.name: KANO-JIGAWA
entities.description: A staple crop processing zone where improved varieties, seed dressing, and tillage practices increased sorghum yields.

entities.name: SOKOTO-KEBBI
entities.description: A staple crop processing zone where improved varieties, seed dressing, and tillage practices increased sorghum yields.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL TRANSFORMATION AGENDA SUPPORT PROGRAM PHASE 1
entities.description: A government program launched in 2015 to create jobs and increase food production.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL TRANSFORMATION AGENDA
entities.description: The predecessor program to AT ASP-1.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The measure of agricultural productivity, specifically for sorghum grains.

entities.name: IMPROVED VARIETIES
entities.description: The use of high-yielding sorghum seed varieties to increase productivity.

entities.name: SEED DRESSING
entities.description: The application of protective coatings to seeds to improve germination and yield.

entities.name: TILLAGE PRACTICES
entities.description: Methods of soil preparation to enhance crop growth and yield.

entities.name: INNOVATION PLATFORMS
entities.description: Collaborative structures used for market linkages and seed procurement.

entities.name: THEMATIC TRAINING
entities.description: Educational sessions provided to farmers as part of the project.

entities.name: ON-FARM TECHNOLOGY DEMONSTRATIONS
entities.description: Practical displays of agricultural technologies on farmers' fields.

entities.name: COMMUNITY SEED PRODUCTION
entities.description: Localized production of quality seeds to increase farmer access.

entities.name: SEED FAIRS
entities.description: Events used to reach non-participating farmers with improved technologies.

entities.name: RURAL RADIOS
entities.description: Communication medium used to disseminate sorghum production technologies.

entities.name: AUDIO-VISUAL BROADCASTS
entities.description: Communication medium used to disseminate sorghum production technologies.

entities.name: STAPLE CROP PROCESSING ZONES
entities.description: Designated geographic areas focused on the processing of staple crops.
